title: Span
description: A single operation or step within a Trace representing an individual component of an LLM call chain such as LLM inference, tool calls, retrieval steps, or guardrail checks.

project_name.description: Name of the project this span belongs to. If null, the default project is used.

project_id.description: UUID of the project this span belongs to.

trace_id.description: UUID of the parent Trace this span belongs to.

parent_span_id.description: UUID of the parent Span for nested span hierarchies.

name.description: Human-readable name for the span (e.g., the function or model name).

type.description: Type of operation this span represents.

input.description: Input data passed to this span operation.

output.description: Output data produced by this span operation.

metadata.description: Additional metadata associated with the span.

model.description: LLM model identifier used in this span (e.g., gpt-4o, claude-3-5-sonnet).

provider.description: LLM provider for this span (e.g., openai, anthropic, google).

usage.description: Token usage statistics for this span (e.g., prompt_tokens, completion_tokens).

error_info.description: Error information if the span encountered a failure.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the span record was created.

last_updated_at.description: Timestamp when the span record was last updated.

created_by.description: Username or identifier of the user who created the span.

last_updated_by.description: Username or identifier of the user who last updated the span.

feedback_scores.description: Evaluation scores attached to this span.

comments.description: User comments attached to this span.

total_estimated_cost.description: Estimated cost of LLM API calls made during this span.
